Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily.
Maintain a balanced diet with plenty of fruits and vegetables.
Get 7-8 hours of sleep every night.
Wash your hands frequently to avoid infections.
Take short breaks every hour if you work at a desk.
Practice mindfulness or meditation to reduce stress.
Avoid excessive sugar and salt in your diet.
Consult your doctor for regular health check-ups.
Stay active and avoid long periods of sitting.
